1: I will love thee, O LORD LORD , my strength.
2: My buckler, and the horn of my salvation, and and my high tower.
3: So shall I be saved from mine enemies.
4: And the floods of ungodly men made me afraid.
5: The snares of death prevented me.
6: And my cry came before him, even even into his ears.
7: The foundations also of the hills moved and were shaken, because he was wroth.
8: And fire out of his mouth devoured: Coals were kindled by it.
9: And darkness was was under his feet.
10: Yea, he did fly upon the wings of the wind.
11: Were Were dark waters and and thick clouds of the skies.
12: Hail stones stones and coals of fire.
13: Hail stones stones and coals of fire.
14: And he shot out lightnings, and discomfited them.
15: At the blast of the breath of thy nostrils.
16: He drew me out of many waters.
17: For they were too strong for me.
18: But the LORD LORD was my stay.
19: He delivered me, because he delighted in me.
20: According to the cleanness of my hands hath he recompensed me.
21: And have not wickedly departed from my God.
22: And I did not put away his statutes from me.
23: And I kept myself from mine iniquity.
24: According to the cleanness of my hands in his eyesight.
25: With an upright man thou wilt shew thyself upright;
26: And with the froward thou wilt shew thyself froward.
27: But wilt bring down high looks.
28: The LORD LORD my God will enlighten my darkness.
29: And by my God have I leaped over a wall.
30: The word of the LORD LORD is tried: He is is a buckler to all those that trust in him.
31: Or who is is a rock save our God?
33: And setteth me upon my high places.
34: So that a bow of steel is broken by mine arms.
35: And thy right hand hath holden me up, and thy gentleness hath made me great.
36: That my feet did not slip.
37: Neither did I turn again till they were consumed.
38: They are fallen under my feet.
39: Thou hast subdued under me those that rose up against me.
40: That I might destroy them that hate me.
41: Even Even unto the LORD LORD , but he answered them not.
42: I did cast them out as the dirt in the streets.
43: I have not known shall serve me.
44: The strangers shall submit themselves unto me.
45: And be afraid out of their close places.
46: And let the God of my salvation be exalted.
47: And subdueth the people under me.
48: Thou hast delivered me from the violent man.
49: And sing praises unto thy name.
50: And sheweth mercy to his anointed, to David, and to his seed for evermore.
